notice.displayName: This node must be connected to an AI chain. Insert one

model.description: The model which will generate the completion. To download models, visit Ollama Models Library.

temperature.description: Controls the randomness of the generated text. Lower values make the output more focused and deterministic, while higher values make it more diverse and random.

topK.description: Limits the number of highest probability vocabulary tokens to consider at each step. A higher value increases diversity but may reduce coherence. Set to -1 to disable.

topP.description: Chooses from the smallest possible set of tokens whose cumulative probability exceeds the probability top_p. Helps generate more human-like text by reducing repetitions.

frequencyPenalty.description: Adjusts the penalty for tokens that have already appeared in the generated text. Higher values discourage repetition.

keepAlive.description: Specifies the duration to keep the loaded model in memory after use. Useful for frequently used models. Format: 1h30m (1 hour 30 minutes).

lowVram.description: Whether to Activate low VRAM mode, which reduces memory usage at the cost of slower generation speed. Useful for GPUs with limited memory.

mainGpu.description: Specifies the ID of the GPU to use for the main computation. Only change this if you have multiple GPUs.

numBatch.description: Sets the batch size for prompt processing. Larger batch sizes may improve generation speed but increase memory usage.

numCtx.description: The maximum number of tokens to use as context for generating the next token. Smaller values reduce memory usage, while larger values provide more context to the model.

numGpu.description: Specifies the number of GPUs to use for parallel processing. Set to -1 for auto-detection.

numPredict.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate. Set to -1 for no limit. Be cautious when setting this to a large value, as it can lead to very long outputs.

numThread.description: Specifies the number of CPU threads to use for processing. Set to 0 for auto-detection.

penalizeNewline.description: Whether the model will be less likely to generate newline characters, encouraging longer continuous sequences of text

presencePenalty.description: Adjusts the penalty for tokens based on their presence in the generated text so far. Positive values penalize tokens that have already appeared, encouraging diversity.

repeatPenalty.description: Adjusts the penalty factor for repeated tokens. Higher values more strongly discourage repetition. Set to 1.0 to disable repetition penalty.

useMLock.description: Whether to lock the model in memory to prevent swapping. This can improve performance but requires sufficient available memory.

useMMap.description: Whether to use memory mapping for loading the model. This can reduce memory usage but may impact performance. Recommended to keep enabled.

vocabOnly.description: Whether to only load the model vocabulary without the weights. Useful for quickly testing tokenization.

format.description: Specifies the format of the API response
